content:
Use the uploaded face image as the facial identity reference for the male subject. Preserve the exact facial structure, hairstyle, beard/stubble details, skin tone, and realistic masculine appearance. Maintain natural skin texture and cinematic realism.

Create a cinematic ultra-realistic nighttime scene inside a dark moody room with a deep shadowy atmosphere. The environment is illuminated by {argument name="neon lighting" default="subtle blue, magenta, and warm orange neon lighting"} reflecting softly across the walls and floor. The mood is emotional, lonely, nostalgic, and artistic.

The camera is positioned behind the man at a cinematic over-the-shoulder/back-view angle. The {argument name="male subject" default="male subject"} is leaning casually against a dark textured wall with one shoulder touching the surface, standing still while gazing at {argument name="viewed object" default="a large hand-drawn portrait sketch mounted on the opposite wall"}. His face is mostly seen in side profile or partially obscured from the rear angle, emphasizing the feeling of solitude and remembrance.

The portrait depicts a breathtakingly beautiful young woman wearing a soft elegant scarf/hijab loosely covering her head. She has a stunning diamond-shaped face, sharp jawline, expressive eyes, delicate features, soft lips, and timeless beauty. The artwork appears handcrafted with charcoal and pencil strokes blended with subtle painterly realism, softly illuminated by a warm hanging lamp above it.

The man stares intensely at the portrait as if lost in memories. His posture conveys silent love, longing, and nostalgia. He holds a slowly burning cigarette in his right hand, with delicate smoke rising upward and blending into the atmospheric haze and neon light.

He wears fitted black pants and a slightly loose light whitish shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms. The upper buttons remain naturally open, subtly revealing part of his chest and collarbone. The fabric reacts realistically to the ambient neon lighting and shadows.

Add cinematic details:

• Camera angle from behind the man, focusing on both the subject and portrait
• Wet reflective floor with neon reflections
• Floating smoke particles and volumetric fog
• Soft depth of field and creamy cinematic bokeh
• Warm rim lighting outlining the man’s silhouette
• Dramatic shadows and high contrast lighting
• Slight premium film grain
• Neo-noir cinematic color grading
• Glowing cigarette ember illuminating fingertips
• Scattered sketch papers and art supplies beneath the portrait
• Moody urban artist studio aesthetic
• Ultra-detailed skin, fabric, smoke, and wall textures
• Shot on a 50mm cinematic lens
• Shallow depth of field
• 8K ultra-realistic cinematic composition

The final image should feel like a lonely artist leaning against a wall in darkness, viewed from behind, silently staring at the portrait of the woman he loves, creating a powerful story of longing, memory, romance, and melancholy through cinematic lighting and atmosphere

​The {argument name="background" default="background features a charming alpine village winding up a hillside, with rustic wooden cabins and stone houses topped with heavy blankets of white snow"}. content:
For the First Image (Magazine Cover)
​A watercolor-style anime illustration of a multi-generational group of {argument name="group size" default="eight people"} posing together for a fashion magazine cover titled "{argument name="magazine title" default="GALAXY"}". The group consists of men, women, and two children dressed in stylish, modern casual wear with cosmic blue, purple, and teal tones. The background features a soft watercolor wash of a purple and blue cosmic nebula, complete with magazine text overlays about galactic fashion.

In the foreground, a couple sits on a leather sofa reading a book together, while a young boy reads on the floor nearby. In the background, other family members are engaged in cosmic discovery: a girl stands on a step ladder reaching for a book, a woman looks at a map, an elderly woman examines a celestial globe at a desk, and a man looks through a handheld telescope alongside a woman holding a star chart.

content:
A heartwarming, slice-of-life anime-style illustration sheet depicting the daily adventures and close bond between a {argument name="character" default="young man"} and his Pokémon partner, {argument name="pokemon" default="Piplup"}. The {argument name="character" default="young man"} has messy, dark black hair and an athletic build, appearing in various casual outfits like hoodies, t-shirts, and a workout tank top. Piplup is depicted with highly expressive, cute, and sometimes comical expressions.
​The image is a collage of multiple wholesome and motivational scenes scattered across the canvas, accompanied by handwritten-style text captions. The scenes include: the duo hugging tightly with the text "Dream big. Work hard. Make it real."; studying together at a desk with a stack of books; working out with a dumbbell where Piplup wears a headband; swimming together happily; going on a grocery run with Piplup sitting in the shopping cart; the man playfully scolding Piplup for eating the last snack; gaming together with a controller; napping soundly on a couch; cooking in the kitchen as a chef and sous chef; wearing matching sunglasses in a "silly mode" pose; jogging together in a park; and the man working intensely on a laptop.
​The bottom features a collection of small "Piplup Moods" showing different cute facial expressions, alongside a touching closing message that reads, "Through every battle, every win, and every failure... you're always by my side. Thank you, Piplup. WE DON'T JUST CHASE DREAMS, WE MAKE THEM HAPPEN." The overall art style is sketchy yet polished, with warm, soft coloring and an inspiring, uplifting atmosphere focused on friendship, discipline, and partnership.

content: Cinematic space opera realism, masterpiece quality. Camera Position: high overhead bird's-eye angle, slightly tilted | Framing: looking down at the emperor and throne from above, the black hole opening directly beneath/behind the throne into infinite darkness, planetary destruction radiating outward in a circular composition. Subject: A dark emperor seated on a colossal floating throne, viewed from a high overhead angle that emphasizes his solitude and dominance against the incomprehensible scale of the black hole below. The throne floats at the exact tipping point of the event horizon — a tiny figure in absolute command of cosmic destruction. Clothing: black robes spread dramatically outward from the throne seat, dissolving into dark smoke that curls into the gravitational pull below. The robe dissolution creates a visual wing-like silhouette when seen from above, giving the emperor a dark angelic geometry. Crown: the crown's golden light projects upward toward the camera, blazing directly at the viewer — a concentrated point of warm radiance against the darkness. Throne: the massive obsidian throne becomes a centerpiece in the circular composition, its edges catching accretion disk amber light, casting long shadows outward in all directions. Background: radiating outward from the throne in a circle: shattered planets at various stages of destruction — some still partially intact with visible surface geography and cloud cover, others reduced to orbiting fragments and glowing magma trails. The black hole's accretion disk forms an enormous ring of fire that fills the extreme background, gravitational lensing creating concentric arcs of bent starlight around the void. The depth of the black hole stretches downward into absolute darkness below the throne. Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. Color Grade: radial color — warm gold and amber at the edges from the accretion disk, deep cold black at the void center | crown warm gold beacon | robe smoke dark violet-black. Textures: detailed planetary surface geography on planet fragments, hyper-detailed robe fabric spread, rough throne stone surface with glinting mineral inclusions. Vibes: 2001 A Space Odyssey meets Avengers Endgame portal scene meets Lovecraftian cosmic scale — overwhelming, circular, mythological.

Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. content:
A wide side-angle shot captures a young woman seated in her office workspace. The camera sits at a slight diagonal, providing a three-quarter view of both her body and the contemporary desk setup, enhancing depth while introducing a slightly unpolished, candid feel typical of early digital photography.
Outfit: {argument name="clothing" default="white dress shirt with rolled sleeves, slightly loosened patterned tie, slim black trousers or pencil skirt, white socks, beige sneakers"} — all actively burning. Her long hair is slightly messy from the heat.
Scene: fire spreads across the floor, walls, and glass partitions. The desk, CRT monitor, keyboard, coffee mug, and mouse reflect the flames.
Lighting: {argument name="lighting style" default="harsh on-camera flash (Y2K digital look)"} creates sharp highlights and flattens parts of the scene. Fire is overexposed in places with clipped highlights. Conflicting color temperatures: cool flash vs warm firelight.
Digital look: visible noise in shadows, slight color banding, over-sharpened edges, compressed dynamics. High depth of field, everything in focus, flash-frozen moment.
Mood: absurd, darkly humorous realism. Calm young woman working while everything burns, making direct eye contact.
Color palette: dark gray, desaturated neutrals interrupted by aggressive oranges and yellows from fire.

content: A cinematic film roll sequence capturing fragments of the character’s exact likeness life as {argument name="scene context" default="extreme scene's fearless stunt actor"}. Each frame reveals a different moment, or phase, evolving naturally without rigid narrative structure.  Maintain exact proportions, eye shape, spacing, stylization, silhouette, and material identity from the reference. Do not humanize. Do not alter anatomy. Identity must remain perfectly consistent across all frames. Do not modify facial structure. Do not add a mouth or nose if the uploaded character does not have them.  The film strip flows through the composition with subtle perspective depth, frames partially cropped, slightly misaligned, or overlapping to avoid perfect symmetry. Some frames feel sharp and present, others fade into blur or grain, creating temporal depth.  Lighting varies per frame but remains cinematic and directional, forming a cohesive emotional rhythm rather than uniform exposure. Introduce natural film imperfections: grain, light leaks, slight motion blur, exposure shifts, and analog texture.  Color grade is controlled and intentional, supporting the emotional tone of the chosen life theme without oversaturation.  The scene must feel like a discovered memory archive rather than a clean layout. No flat composition, no centered symmetry, no full-frame sharpness.  ar 16:9
title: Cinematic Film Roll Archive
description: A prompt for generating a cinematic film strip sequence of a character's life with consistent identity and analog film texture.

content:
A wide, cinematic photorealistic night image. In the scene, a {argument name="subject" default="young Asian woman with shoulder-length straight hair"} and a serene demeanor is walking barefoot in profile across mirror-like shallow water. She is wearing an {argument name="outfit" default="elegant, flowing silver-grey sequined gown with spaghetti straps and a high slit"}, which billows subtly as she walks. Her head is slightly lowered.
If a reference photo is provided, please closely match her facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, overall body proportions, and her unique aura; meanwhile, her clothing and accessories can be naturally adjusted to fit the scene.
The water surface features a perfect mirror reflection, but directly beneath her feet, her own reflection is completely replaced by a magnificent and highly detailed spirit-tiger. This spirit-tiger is composed of intricate white-silver lines and emits a soft blue glow. The spirit-tiger appears in a reverse reflection, clearly sniffing a luminous white-gold rose bud (whose light is as pure as moonlight) that exists exclusively within the reflection. A long trail of delicate, glowing rose buds and petals drifts down from the woman's hand, forming an elegant arc that floats up and around her as she walks, ultimately extending down to the glowing rose beneath the spirit-tiger's nose. Faint glowing sparkles shimmer around her bare feet.
The minimalist horizon features distant dark islands. The sky is a deep indigo, dotted with subtle stars, a clear Milky Way, and a massive, glowing full moon. The image features subtle, cool-toned cinematic lighting from the moon and night sky, alongside the internal glow radiating from the spirit-tiger and the rose. Elegant silver-white calligraphy text at the bottom center reads: '{argument name="text" default="In me the tiger sniffs the rose."}' High dynamic range (HDR) night reflections, extreme detail, 8K resolution, surrealism style.
title: Spirit-Tiger Water Walk
description: A surreal and cinematic prompt for Nano Banana 2 featuring a woman walking on water with a spirit-tiger in her reflection.

content: An enormous canvas — taller than a building — stands in the middle of a {argument name="environment" default="barren cracked desert"} at golden hour. The painting on it is almost complete: a {argument name="painted scene" default="hyperrealistic landscape of a lush green forest"}. But at the edges of the painted forest, the paint is actively peeling away and the trees are crawling off the canvas into the real desert — painted trees becoming three-dimensional, roots cracking into the dry earth, leaves casting real shadows. A {argument name="observer" default="tiny human figure"} stands at the base of the canvas looking up, dwarfed by its scale, unsure whether to step into the painted world or pull the trees back. The boundary between painted and real is the most detailed part — half flat brushstroke, half living texture. On the wooden frame of the canvas, Vertical 9:13 format. Ultra photorealistic, 8K, no text overlays, cinematic color grading.

content:
Format: Vertical 4-panel grayscale manga
Genre: Modern romantic comedy
Art style: Seinen manga, expressive faces
Dialogue: Speech bubbles in Japanese

Panel 1
Scene:
A boy in a school uniform clenches his fist, making a smug face with a sparkling aura.
Sparkles and effect lines in the background
Speech bubble (Japanese):
“I’ve gained the power to stop time! Now I can be with the girl I love...!”

Panel 2
Scene: Flashback scene, no dialogue, sparkling effects

The panel contains about three small flashback cuts.
・Scene of confessing to a female classmate in a sailor uniform (blushing cheeks)
・Scene of dating in college (casual clothes, holding hands, smiling)
・Wedding scene (wedding dress and tuxedo, pet dog beside them, confetti)

Overall soft light, heart and flower tones, sparkles.
No dialogue.

Panel 3
Scene: Living room of the new house, night, calm atmosphere
The grown man sits leaning forward on the sofa with a serious face, tense posture. Hands clasped in front of his face.
Lived-in living room (table, curtains, houseplants, etc.).
Speech bubble (Japanese):
“Actually, I have the power to stop time, and I want to play time-stop games with you.”
The man is extremely serious.

Panel 4
Scene: Wife stands up with a sharp retort expression
The wife has a surprised face and makes a sharp retort, with shock lightning in the background.
The dog behind her is innocently smiling with its mouth open, tilting its head with a “?” mark floating above it.
Speech bubble (Japanese):
“If you’ve made it this far, don’t you not need it anymore!?”
Small “?” next to the dog.

description: A detailed, multi-panel prompt for Nano Banana Pro to generate a grayscale, vertical four-panel romantic comedy manga about a man with time-stopping ability, focusing on specific scenes, character expressions, and dialogue in Japanese.

content:
Format: Japanese 4-panel manga, 4 vertical tiers, grayscale, seinen manga, exaggerated expressions.
Setting: Fantasy world, slum alleyway, dim atmosphere, cobblestones and dirty walls, trash and barrels are placed around.

[Character Settings]
・Rough Man: Outlaw who failed as an adventurer, scarred face, stubble, shabby leather gear, ugly man with a bad attitude.
・Female Hero: Beautiful woman, well-defined features, dignified eyes, clean light armor or hero-style gear, strong-willed expression.

[Panel 1]
Composition: Alleyway, the rough man pushes the female hero against the wall (kabedon).
The man standing on the right is smirking, the female hero cornered against the wall on the left has a frustrated expression.
Dialogue:
Rough Man: "Well, well, look how docile the Hero-sama has become."
Female Hero: "Ugh... you scum..."

[Panel 2]
Composition: Still in the kabedon pose, slightly zoomed in, the man on the right has a confident smile, the female hero glares back.
Dialogue:
Rough Man: "You're quite the eccentric Hero-sama... to fall for an ugly guy like me."
Female Hero: "Stop implying that I'm a pervert!"

[Panel 3]
Composition: Female Hero's serious face, extreme close-up, front view.
Dialogue:
Female Hero: "Your appearance and personality are trash, but your 'stuff' is superb. You should be aware of your own capabilities."
The female hero gives a thumbs-up with a serious face.

[Panel 4]
Composition: Upper body of the man, looking away, face red, confused and flustered. He is fidgeting with his hand on his head.
Background is the alleyway. Onomatopoeia effects like "Doki Doki" (heartbeat).
Dialogue:
Rough Man: "Eh, ah, yes... thank you very much..."
title: Four-Panel Manga: Fantasy Alleyway Wall-Slam
description: A detailed, multi-panel prompt for generating a four-panel manga (yonkoma) in Japanese, featuring a rough man and a beautiful female hero in a dark fantasy alleyway setting, focusing on exaggerated expressions and specific dialogue and composition for each panel.

content:
A cinematic macro toy-photography scene of the uploaded reference character multiplied into dozens of miniature identical instances, each actively working on a giant open comic book that tells the story of the same character.
Likeness Integrity (CRITICAL)

All miniature instances must preserve the exact identity of the reference character:

• identical proportions

• exact eye shape, spacing, stylization

• same silhouette and material behavior

• no added features, no face changes, no stylization drift
The comic book artwork must depict the exact same character design language, translated into printed comic style without altering anatomy or facial structure.
Scene Concept & Action
The giant comic book lies open like a construction site of narrative.
Mini characters are scattered across the pages, each performing a specific task:
• some are drawing panels with tiny tools (pens, brushes, stylus-like tools)

• some are painting color into panels

• some are climbing panel borders like scaffolding

• some are inspecting scenes, pointing, directing

• some are physically interacting with the comic world ( lifting panels, stepping into frames)
The scene must feel like they are building their own story in real-time.
Perspective & Composition (MANDATORY)
Camera & Perspective (Corrected)
Low-angle macro shot, camera positioned close to the comic page
Lens: 90–100mm macro (compression, NOT distortion)
• Perspective compression must preserve consistent object scale

• Foreground character appears larger only due to proximity to lens

• No exaggerated wide-angle distortion

• Spatial depth created through distance falloff + focus, not scaling

• The open comic book stretches diagonally into depth

• Panels form strong leading lines across the frame

• Composition is intentionally off-balance, not centered

• Some characters partially cropped by frame edges
Foreground includes blurred ink tools, paper edges, or panel borders creating depth layering
Depth of Field (CRITICAL)
Extremely shallow depth of field
• Primary focal plane: one or two mini characters in the foreground actively working

• Mid-ground characters slightly softer

• Background characters and panels fall into creamy blur
No full-frame sharpness
Focus must guide the viewer toward the “main worker” character
Lighting Doctrine
Hard directional cinematic light from top-left
• sharp shadows cast across comic panels

• subtle rim light separating characters from page

• ink reflections create small specular highlights

• shadows from panel edges create natural depth
No flat lighting
Environment & Surface Detail
Macro-level realism of the comic book:
• visible paper fibers

• ink texture and slight gloss

• subtle imperfections in print

• panel borders slightly raised or embossed
Tiny tools leave micro mar
title: Cinematic Macro Toy-Photography of Mini Beasts
description: A complex, multi-section prompt for generating a cinematic macro toy-photography scene. The concept involves dozens of miniature identical character instances working on a giant open comic book that tells their story. The prompt strictly enforces likeness integrity, specific camera perspective (low-angle macro, 90-100mm lens), shallow depth of field, and hard directional lighting.

content: A cinematic speed-motion shot of the uploaded reference character captured mid-slide on a rain-slicked, neon-drenched cyberpunk street. The focus is equally on the reflection and the character, forming a dual-layer composition. Likeness Preservation (CRITICAL): Maintain exact proportions, eye shape, spacing, stylization, silhouette, and material identity from the reference. Do not humanize. Do not reinterpret anatomy. Do not modify facial structure. Identity must remain perfectly intact and instantly recognizable. 2D to 3D Translation (ONLY if input is 2D artwork): If the uploaded reference is 2D (illustration, anime, flat graphic, cel-shaded), convert it into a fully realized 3D cinematic form while preserving exact identity fidelity. Maintain exact head shape, eye design, spacing, and proportions. Preserve original stylization, do NOT add realism that alters design language. Translate linework into subtle surface geometry or shading transitions. Keep original colors, expressed through physically believable materials. Convert flat shading into controlled cinematic light falloff. The result must feel physically real, not redesigned. Camera & Perspective: Ultra-low angle, camera positioned just centimeters above the wet pavement. Lens: 18–20mm ultra-wide. Slight Dutch tilt (5–10 degrees) to destabilize the frame. Front three-quarter perspective. One limb or body part must be closer to the lens, creating perspective pressure. Composition (Reflection Dominance): The character slices diagonally across the upper half of the frame. The lower half is dominated by a sharp but slightly distorted reflection. Vertical neon signs in the background must mirror into the wet ground, forming strong graphic lines. The composition must feel off-balance and tension-driven, not centered or stable. Pose Enforcement (CRITICAL — OVERRIDE ALL DEFAULT STANCES): The character must NOT be upright, balanced, or casually sliding. The pose must represent loss of balance under high speed. The torso is pitched aggressively forward, close to the ground. One limb forcefully contacts the wet surface, creating splash and friction. The opposite limb extends outward or backward, fully stretched for counterbalance. Legs are asymmetrical: one trailing, one collapsing or stepping incorrectly. Spine forms a diagonal or curved line, never vertical. Head leads the motion slightly ahead of the torso. Weight Distribution: Weight is NOT centered. It collapses toward the contacting limb and forward motion. Ground Interaction (MANDATORY): Water splashes outward from impact points. Friction streaks beneath sliding limb. Surface tension visibly disturbed. Energy Read: The pose must feel like mid-fall recovery, evasive maneuver at high speed, barely controlled momentum. NOT clean skating, surfing, balanced glide, or upright slide. Perspective Amplification: At least one limb must appear larger due to proximity to the lens, enhancing speed and aggression. Motion & Blur: Directional motion blur trailing from the lowest moving limbs. Sharp focal plane on the face or upper torso. Background and trailing limbs fall into controlled blur. Lighting & Color (Cyberpunk Neon): Hard directional neon lighting from off-screen vertical sources. Color palette: deep cyan, magenta, electric yellow. Lighting behavior: sharp highlights on wet surfaces, strong rim light separating silhouette, deep shadow pockets. No flat lighting. Surface Detail (Hyper-Reflective): Wet pavement must feel physically real: mirror-like reflections with ripple distortion, micro scratches and pooling water, subtle rain impact patterns. Character materials slightly darkened from moisture. Atmosphere: Heavy rain and mist in the background. Volumetric light beams cutting through haze. Dense air perspective. Foreground may include subtle water droplets or mist near lens for depth. Emotion: Urgency. Instability. High-stakes motion. The character is either escaping or chasing. Negative Constraints: No centered composition. No upright balanced pose. No clean symmetrical stance. No dry surfaces. No flat reflections. No studio lighting. No evenly sharp full-frame clarity. No static posture. Background Pixel Wall Art (Depth-Controlled): Replace the LED sign with a weathered wall-mounted pixel-art mural or printed panel of the character. The pixel version must preserve silhouette and identity but appear faded, worn, and partially damaged. Printed or painted on a rough wall surface, not glowing like a screen. Subtle grime, scratches, peeling, or moisture distortion. Colors desaturated and affected by environment. Depth Control (CRITICAL): Must sit clearly in the background plane. Slightly obscured by haze, rain, or foreground motion. Edges softened, not crisp. Reduced contrast compared to main subject. Lighting Integration: Does NOT emit light. Only receives ambient neon spill. Partially falls into shadow. Pixel Art Identity Lock (CRITICAL): The pixel-art version must be a direct downscaled translation of the original character, not a reinterpretation. Preserve exact silhouette, head shape, and proportions. Preserve exact eye shape and spacing in simplified pixel form. Use the same facial structure logic — do NOT invent or add features. STRICT PROHIBITIONS: No added nose. No added mouth. No added facial features that do not exist in the original. No stylization drift toward generic pixel characters. If the original character has a minimal or abstract face, the pixel version must remain equally minimal. Foreground Chaos Layer (CRITICAL – DEPTH & IMMERSION): Introduce aggressive near-lens elements that partially obstruct the frame and enhance depth. Near-Lens Elements: Water droplets, splashes, or streaks crossing very close to the camera. Out-of-focus rain particles catching neon light. Small debris or mist fragments passing across the lens plane. These elements must feel physically between the viewer and the character, not part of the background. Depth Behavior (MANDATORY): Foreground elements are heavily out of focus due to proximity. Large soft bokeh shapes or streaks may partially cover edges of the frame. Some elements may briefly occlude parts of the character or reflection. The frame must feel layered: foreground chaos, main subject, background environment. Lens Interaction (IMPORTANT): Subtle water streaks or droplets may appear on the lens surface. Slight distortion or refraction through droplets is allowed. Effects must remain minimal and believable, never covering the focal subject completely. Lighting Interaction: Foreground particles catch neon light (cyan, magenta, yellow). Creates glowing streaks or soft colored flares. Adds dimensional separation between planes. Composition Impact: Frame edges may feel dirty or partially blocked. The image should NOT feel clean or perfectly framed. Slight visual interference is intentional. Emotion: The viewer feels inside the scene, not watching it. ar 16:9

content:
Early morning. Total silence.

A hyper-serious spy thriller vibe.

A sleek black SUV idles outside a quiet suburban house. Two “tactical” men in earpieces whisper intensely.

“Target is inside.”
“Movement in the kitchen.”
“Stand by.”
Inside the house—
A dad in sweatpants stands in front of the fridge, staring into it like it contains classified secrets.

Cut back outside.

“Subject has opened the cold storage unit.”
“Thermal spike detected.”

Inside, he pulls out milk. Shakes it. Sniffs it. Makes a face.

Outside, one agent squints at a tablet.
“He’s analyzing chemical integrity.”
The front door creaks open.

The dad steps onto the porch in mismatched slippers to grab the newspaper.

Both agents snap alert.
“Target exiting the compound.”
“Visual confirmed. He looks… unstable.”
The dad waves awkwardly at them.

They freeze.

He squints. “You guys DoorDash?”

Beat.
They look at each other.
Inside the SUV, a third “commander” barks through the radio:
“Abort. Wrong house. Again.”

The agents slowly lower their sunglasses.

The dad shrugs, walks back inside.

Cut to kitchen.

He sits at the table with his cereal. Turns on the TV.

BREAKING NEWS: “International spy ring apprehended after staking out random suburban dad for third straight day.”

He crunches loudly.
Milk drips down his chin.

He sighs.

“Finally.”
title: Spy Thriller Comedy Storyboard Prompt
description: A narrative prompt designed to generate a multi-panel storyboard for a comedic spy thriller scene involving tactical agents staking out a suburban dad who is just looking for milk in his fridge.

content:
Scene 1
Use a smooth dolly shot to approach the window, transitioning from a long shot to a medium shot of the subject taking a deep breath in the morning light. Focus on subtle movements like relaxing the shoulders and finger reactions, creating an adorable atmosphere with distant natural sounds (birds chirping, wind) layered with delicate piano music. Crossfade to a close-up where the window light reflects on the fingertips.

Scene 2
Use close-ups focusing on steaming cups and small objects to rhythmically follow the hand movements (lifting the cup, stirring with a spoon, etc.). Use a combination of slow motion and light time-lapse to express warmth and innocence, layering sound effects like breathing and small laughs. The steam fills the screen and dissolves, leading to the next scene.

Scene 3
The camera pulls back to show the whole scene, concluding with the light movement of the subject ready to go out. Show the lingering atmosphere through the rhythm of steps and hand gestures, concluding cinematically with a backlit silhouette and soft color tones. The music gently fades out, leaving the lingering feeling of everyday life.

content:
Overall Style Prompt: Chinese Wuxia fantasy style, cinematic quality, motion blur, abandoned ancient temple in heavy rain, gloomy sky, lightning occasionally illuminating raindrops and broken eaves, the image is full of power and speed.

• Scene 1 (0-3 seconds): Dark Raven drags his sword, Azure Frost descends 
• Visuals: Rain pours down. Dark Raven wears heavy black armor emanating an ominous purple aura, dragging a massive chained dark iron greatsword with one hand. The blade scrapes the stone ground, creating dazzling sparks and ripples. His eyes are sinister as he looks ahead. Immediately after, Azure Frost lightly descends from the broken eaves of the ancient temple like a falling leaf. Her white and cyan tight-fitting outfit is sharp, her high ponytail flies, and the blue longsword in her hand is drawn with a 'zheng' sound, its cold aura pushing back the surrounding rain curtain. The two face off in the rain. 
• Cinematography: Extreme low-angle follow shot tracking the greatsword's path, then the camera quickly pulls back to show the full view of the confrontation in the rainy courtyard—one black and heavy, the other cyan and light. 
• Dialogue/Sound Effects: Dark Raven (low and hoarse): "{argument name="Dark Raven dialogue" default="You are beyond redemption."}" 
• Sound Effects: Heavy metal scraping, torrential rain, wind. 

• Scene 2 (3-6 seconds): Greatsword sweeps, light sword strikes like a flash • Visuals: Dark Raven suddenly exerts force, swinging the greatsword with both arms. A crescent-shaped black sword energy tears through the rain curtain and sweeps out. Raindrops evaporate in its path, and the stone ground is plowed open. Azure Frost's eyes narrow. Tapping the water surface with her toe, her body shoots up like a kite, executing a nimble side flip in the air, narrowly avoiding the sword energy. At the same time, using the momentum of her descent, the cold light of her sword tip condenses, striking straight at Dark Raven's throat like a meteor. 
• Cinematography: Fast-paced cuts. First, a side follow shot (Dolly Shot) captures the black sword energy slicing countless raindrops in slow motion, then switches to a high-angle view, showing the graceful trajectory of Azure Frost's aerial evasion and counterattack.
• Sound Effects: Heavy whistling of the greatsword cutting the air, 'chichi' sound of sword energy evaporating, sound of clothes tearing the wind. 

• Scene 3 (6-9 seconds): Mid-air clash, sparks fly • Visuals: Dark Raven swings his greatsword back, colliding precisely with Azure Frost's descending longsword! "Clang—!" The immense power of the greatsword fiercely clashes with the nimble cold aura of the longsword, erupting in dazzling blue-white sparks and a shockwave that pushes away all the surrounding rain. Dark Raven presses down with his strength advantage, while Azure Frost uses her light footwork, tapping the greatsword with her toe, using the force to backflip and resolve the immense pressure. 
• Cinematography: Orbiting shot (Bullet Time). The camera centers on the point of weapon collision, rotating 360 degrees rapidly, finally freezing on a close-up of the moment of maximum sparks and the two forces counteracting. 
• Dialogue/Sound Effects: Azure Frost (cold and firm): "{argument name="Azure Frost dialogue" default="Evil will not prevail!"}" 
• Sound Effects: Huge metal collision roar, humming sound of power confrontation. 

• Scene 4 (9-12 seconds): Azure shadows continuous, black wall defends • Visuals: The moment she lands, Azure Frost launches an attack. Her figure turns into a cyan afterimage, her longsword stabs rapidly, instantly transforming into several fierce cyan sword lights attacking Dark Raven from different angles. The cold aura of the sword tips leaves streaks of frost in the air. Dark Raven lets out a low roar, swinging the heavy greatsword into an impenetrable barrier, forming a purple-black sword energy shield. Amidst the dense 'ding-dang' sounds, the cyan sword lights are all blocked, but the powerful impact still forces Dark Raven to retreat three steps, each step crushing the stone bricks beneath his feet. 
• Cinematography: One-shot handheld follow shot (Shaky Cam). The camera closely follows Azure Frost's attack trajectory, with slight shaking accompanying each stab, then quickly pans to Dark Raven's defense and retreat, creating a strong sense of immersion. 
• Sound Effects: Dense, crisp sound of sword tips hitting the barrier, sound of stone bricks cracking, heavy footsteps and panting. 

• Scene 5 (12-15 seconds): Ultimate collision, swallowing the universe • Visuals: Dark Raven is enraged, injecting all his purple energy into the greatsword, plunging it into the ground! Boom! A thick purple-black light column shoots up into the sky, stirring the clouds above. Azure Frost shows no fear, pouring all her cold energy into her sword. Man and sword become one, transforming into a massive, pure cyan stream of light, descending like a comet, striking straight at the center of the light column. The two collide with a roar! Time seems to stand still, followed by an explosive, blinding white light and a circular airwave that sweeps away all the rain, debris, and dead leaves in the entire courtyard. 
• Cinematography: Rapid close-up zoom out. First, quick cuts between close-ups of Dark Raven's cold eyes and Azure Frost's determined eyes, then the camera rapidly pulls up and back like a rocket (Crane Up), turning into a distant overhead view, showing the shocking full scene of the expanding white light and the airwave sweeping across the ruins of the ancient temple. The image freezes at the peak of the white light. 
• Dialogue/Sound Effects: (Before collision) Dark Raven's roar and Azure Frost's clear shout intertwine.
• Sound Effects: Humming sound of energy convergence, earth-shattering explosion, followed by all sounds fading, leaving only the receding echo of the rain.

Xiao Jingheng, his face covered in blood, draws his sword and points it at Shen Qingtang, shouting hysterically: "I have accompanied you through ninety-nine reincarnations, yet you still haven't defeated him! My intolerance for stupidity is about to flare up!"
The woman in front of Xiao Jingheng, Shen Qingtang, sits on the ground, gently stroking Cheng Jingchuan, who is barely alive, in her arms.
Upon hearing this, she suddenly looks up in surprise and says, "You, you are also a reincarnator?"

"Useless! You big idiot! I've accompanied you through ninety-nine reincarnations."

content:
Use the uploaded photograph as the only visual reference.
The person’s identity must be preserved with maximum accuracy: face, facial features, age, gender, body proportions, and overall appearance must remain unchanged.
Do not invent or add anything that does not exist in the original image.

Step 1: Detailed visual analysis of the source image
First, perform a careful visual analysis of the uploaded image, including:
Who is in the image (person, number of people, position in frame)
Body pose and direction of gaze
Facial expression and emotional mood
Clothing and accessories
Lighting conditions, time of day, color temperature
Environment, background, and depth of space
Overall emotional tone of the scene

Step 2: Cinematic 3×2 storyboard grid
After the analysis, create a cinematic 3×2 grid (6 frames) from the single image, as if it were a sequence of shots from a film.

Global requirements for the entire grid:
Format: one image containing a 3×2 grid
All frames must be numbered 1–6, left to right, top to bottom
Visual style: realistic, cinematic, non-illustrative
One consistent character and environment with logical continuity
Each frame must differ by pose, camera angle, or camera distance
The sequence should feel like time is passing and the scene is developing
No facial distortion, no change in identity or appearance

Frame descriptions:

Frame 1 (No. 1)
Wide establishing shot.
The camera is farthest from the subject, showing the full environment and context.
The person feels like part of the surrounding space.

Frame 2 (No. 2)
Medium shot.
The camera moves closer.
The pose changes slightly, revealing inner emotion or state of mind.

Frame 3 (No. 3)
Low-angle or side-angle shot.
Adds drama or tension, emphasizing body shape and perspective.

Frame 4 (No. 4)
Close-up or medium close-up.
Focus on the face, eyes, and emotion.
Fine details are clearly visible.

Frame 5 (No. 5)
Dynamic angle: diagonal composition or camera movement.
The pose changes the most, creating a sense of action or momentum.

Frame 6 (No. 6)
Final shot.
Calm, reflective, or emotionally resolved.
The camera may be closer or farther, but the frame feels like a conclusion.

Lighting & cinematic consistency:
Lighting must remain logically consistent across all frames, as if filmed in one continuous scene.

Depth of field, lighting, and color grading should reinforce a cinematic look.

Final result:
The output should resemble a professional cinematic storyboard, captured in a single take and location, with strong realism and narrative flow.

Preserve the subject’s identity exactly from the reference photo: same facial structure, asymmetry, skin texture, pores, dirt, sweat. No beautification. Practical, battle-worn realism. Environment: open desert wasteland, orange sand and dust clouds, saturated turquoise sky. content:
Genre: Modern Fantasy / Romantic Comedy
Format: Vertical 4-panel manga
Style: Bright romantic comedy tone, expressive faces, no grayscale tone expression
Setting: Modern Japanese city streets
Clothing: Modern style (Elf: stylish casual clothes + ears, Man: casual clothes)

Panel 1
Modern city streets.
An elf woman with long ears is standing with her arms crossed, looking cool and exasperated. Positioned on the right side of the screen.
In front of her, a human man is kneeling and offering a bouquet of flowers. Positioned on the left side of the screen.
The man is desperate, and the woman is clearly rejecting him.

Dialogue:
Elf Woman
“Give up already, mortal. I will never accept human love.”

Panel 2
The human man, still holding the bouquet, leans forward desperately. Positioned on the left side of the screen.
The background shows speed lines indicating intensity.
The elf is slightly backing away. Positioned on the right side of the screen.

Dialogue:
Human Man
“In this day and age, interspecies marriage is common! Differences in lifespan or species don't matter when it comes to love!”

Panel 3
The elf woman shows a dark, somber expression, making a gesture as if showing a smartphone. Positioned on the right side of the screen.
The man looks serious, sensing something. Positioned on the left side of the screen.

Dialogue:
Elf
“Hmph, look at this, and tell me if you can still say the same?”

Human Man
(Could it be that Ms. Elf has a sad past!?)

Panel 4
The elf woman shows the smartphone to the human man. Tears are welling up in her eyes. Positioned on the right side of the screen.
The man looks dissatisfied after seeing it. Profile view, positioned on the left side of the screen.

Dialogue:
Elf Woman
“Even you wouldn't want to get involved in a social game that looks like it will end service in a short time, would you?”

Background shows the smartphone screen. The screen displays: “Mortal Love Online ~Lifespan Difference Doesn't Matter☆~ Service has ended.” Styled like an official otome game website.

Human Man
“Ah, I understand the feeling, but I don't want to accept this reason~”

It includes specific scene descriptions for each of the four panels, detailing character placement, actions, expressions, and the exact dialogue for a humorous interaction between an elf woman and a human man concerning a discontinued mobile game.

content:
Horizontal 16:9 cinematic continuous storyboard, realistic documentary style. Reference Image 1 for character spatial relationship, position, and style; Reference Image 2 for character appearance. This prompt includes four specific frame instructions:

Panel 1 (Side Profile Close-up): Focus on the facial features (platinum blonde hair, green eyes) of the character from Image 2 reading in bed, referencing Image 1. Apply background blur and retain the cool-toned lighting from Image 1.

Panel 2 (Reading Back View): Recreate the action of “lying on the bed reading” from Image 1, but use the clothing of the character from Image 2, emphasizing the {argument name="weather" default="snowy scene"} outside the window.

Panel 3 (Medium Shot Low Angle): Reference Image 1 for the action position. This is a highly dramatic perspective, reflecting the narrowness of the room and the spatial relationship of the character, highlighting details of the bookshelf and poster wall.

Panel 4 (Full View/Fisheye): Add a wide-angle shot (referencing the perspective of Image 1) to establish the overall environment and set the mood of “staying home on a snowy day.”

content:
Output image is 2x2 four-panel split
Video Style: {argument name="video style" default="2000s Japanese Anime OVA style"}
Background:
Late-night city streets. Gaps between deserted roads and skyscrapers. Black liquid splattered from a giant monster adheres to the asphalt and walls. Dust and sparks are flying.

Character 1:
High school girl with long black hair. Wearing a sailor uniform. A Japanese sword is sheathed and hanging at her waist. She looks around cautiously, adopting a low stance.
Character 2:
High school girl with blonde bob hair. Wearing a blazer uniform. Standing behind her companion, holding one hand ready to use her ability at any moment. Her expression is tense.
Enemy Presence:
Black liquid gathers and transforms into a humanoid entity with a fibrous, thread-like texture. Its face is vague, its limbs are unnaturally long, and it crawls across the ground and walls with unnatural movements.

Cut 1:
Close-up of the ground. Filled with black liquid. Flying dust and sparks
Cut 2:
Medium shot. The humanoid anomaly, rising from the black liquid, awkwardly begins to stand up. Thread-like shadows droop, dragging on the ground.
Cut 3:
Low-angle wide shot. Multiple anomalies appear one after another from the roads and walls, encircling the girls in a circle. The cityscape emphasizes the feeling of being surrounded.
Cut 4:
Shot over the girls' backs. In front of them is a horde of black humanoids closing in. The black-haired girl rests her hand on the sheath, and the blonde-haired girl prepares to activate her ability.
The composition emphasizes the tension right before the battle.
title: 2000s OVA Style High School Girl Monster Hunt
description: A detailed, multi-part prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to generate a four-panel sequence in the style of a 2000s Japanese Anime OVA. The scene depicts two high school girls confronting amorphous, liquid-based monsters in a deserted city at night, focusing on tension and composition.

content:
A clean 3×3 [ratio] storyboard grid with nine equal [ratio] sized panels on [4:5] ratio. 

Use the reference image as the base product reference. Keep the same product, packaging design, branding, materials, colors, proportions and overall identity across all nine panels exactly as the reference. The product must remain clearly recognizable in every frame. The label, logo and proportions must stay exactly the same.

This storyboard is a high-end designer mockup presentation for a branding portfolio. The focus is on form, composition, materiality and visual rhythm rather than realism or lifestyle narrative. The overall look should feel curated, editorial and design-driven.

FRAME 1:
Front-facing hero shot of the product in a clean studio setup. Neutral background, balanced composition, calm and confident presentation of the product.

FRAME 2:
Close-up shot with the focus centered on the middle of the product. Focusing on surface texture, materials and print details.

FRAME 3:
Shows the reference product placed in an environment that naturally fits the brand and product category. Studio setting inspired by the product design elements and colours. 

FRAME 4:
Product shown in use or interaction on a neutral studio background. Hands and interaction elements are minimal and restrained, the look matches the style of the package. 

FRAME 5:
Isometric composition showing multiple products arranged in a precise geometric order from the top isometric angle. All products are placed at the same isometric top angle, evenly spaced, clean, structured and graphic.

FRAME 6:
Product levitating slightly tilted on a neutral background that matches the reference image color palette. Floating position is angled and intentional, the product is floating naturally in space.

FRAME 7:
is an extreme close-up focusing on a specific detail of the label, edge, texture or material behavior.

FRAME 8:
The product in an unexpected yet aesthetically strong setting that feels bold, editorial and visually striking.
Unexpected but highly stylized setting. Studio-based, and designer-driven. Bold composition that elevates the brand.

FRAME 9:
Wide composition showing the product in use, placed within a refined designer setup. Clean props, controlled styling, cohesive with the rest of the series.

CAMERA & STYLE:
Ultra high-quality studio imagery with a real camera look. Different camera angles and framings across frames. Controlled depth of field, precise lighting, accurate materials and reflections. Lighting logic, color palette, mood and visual language must remain consistent across all nine panels as one cohesive series.

OUTPUT:
A clean 3×3 grid with no borders, no text, no captions and no watermarks.
title: 9-Panel Product Storyboard Mockup Prompt
description: A highly structured prompt designed to generate a 3x3 storyboard grid for a high-end product branding portfolio. It mandates using a reference image for product consistency across all nine panels and specifies unique composition, focus, and setting for each frame, emphasizing form, composition, and visual rhythm over realism.

content:
Place 9 panels of [ratio] size in a [4:5] ratio on a clean 3x3 [ratio] storyboard grid.

Use the reference image as the base image for the product. The product, packaging design, branding, materials, colors, ratio, and overall identity must be exactly the same as the reference image. The product must be clearly recognizable in all frames. Labels, logos, and ratios must be exactly the same.

This storyboard is a high-end designer mock-up presentation for a branding portfolio. It focuses on shape, composition, material, and visual rhythm, not realism or lifestyle narratives. The overall look should convey a curated, edited, and design-driven impression.

Frame 1:
A hero shot of the product taken from the front in a clean studio setup. Neutral background, balanced composition, calm and confident product presentation.

Frame 2:
A close-up shot focused on the center of the product. Focus on surface texture, material, and printing details.

Frame 3:
The reference product placed in an environment that naturally blends into the brand and product category. Studio setting inspired by the product's design elements and colors.

Frame 4:
A scene showing the product being used or interacted with against a neutral studio background. Hands and interaction elements are minimized, with an appearance that matches the packaging style.

Frame 5:
An isometric composition with multiple products viewed from the top, arranged in precise geometric order. All products are viewed from the same top isometric perspective, evenly spaced, clean, and graphic.

Frame 6:
The product is slightly tilted and floating against a neutral background that matches the reference image's color palette. The product floats naturally in space due to the intentionally angled floating.

Frame 7:
An extremely close-up shot focusing on specific details such as labels, edges, textures, or material behavior.

Frame 8:
The product is in an unexpected yet aesthetically powerful setting, giving a bold, editorial, and visually striking impression.

Unexpected yet highly stylized setting. Studio-based, designer-led production. Bold composition that enhances the brand image.

Frame 9:
A wide composition showing the product in use within a sophisticated designer setting. Minimal props, controlled styling, and consistency with the rest of the series.

Camera and Style:
Ultra-high quality studio photography with a realistic camera look. Different camera angles and framing for each frame. Depth of field, accurate lighting, precise materials and reflections. The lighting logic, color palette, mood, and visual language must be consistent across all nine panels, unifying them as a single series.

Output:
A clean 3x3 grid without borders, text, captions, or watermarks.
title: Detailed Storyboard Prompt for Brand Visuals
description: A highly detailed, multi-frame prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to generate a clean, professional 3x3 storyboard grid for a branding portfolio. It emphasizes consistency in product identity, color, and ratio across all nine frames, focusing on composition, material, and visual rhythm rather than narrative.

content:
STRICT ADHERENCE REQUIRED:
  - Follow this YAML specification precisely. Do NOT deviate, add unauthorized elements, or make 'creative' interpretations.
  - Character identity consistency from reference images (if provided) is PARAMOUNT.
  - Thorough image analysis is mandatory to maintain this consistency. Any result that fails character identity checks is unacceptable.

Strict_Adherence: true
aspect_ratio: "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="2:3"}" # Change as needed (e.g., "1:1", "16:9")
resolution: "{argument name="resolution" default="2K"}"    # Change as needed (e.g., "4K")
Character_Count: {{ Total number of characters appearing }}
Total_Panel_Count: {{ Total number of panels (usually 4-8 for a 4-tier structure) }}

Summary: >
  {argument name="summary" default="Overall summary of the story. Briefly describe the plot flow, setting, main events, and conclusion."}

Style_Guide:
  # Panel division style is fixed to "no outer frame, display to canvas edge"
  comic_style: "4-tier, multi-panel manga strip with no outer framing border. The panels should extend to the very edge of the canvas, separated only by the inner white dividing lines."
  lighting: "{{ Specify lighting. Time of day (day/night), light source (sunlight/electric light/moonlight), atmosphere (bright/dark/dramatic shadows), etc. }}"
  background_elements: "{{ Main setting, specific description of the location, important props or environmental elements placed. }}"
  dialogue_bubbles: "Standard white bubbles for speech, thought clouds for internal thoughts, dashed bubbles for whispers, and rectangular boxes for narration/monologue. {{ Add definitions for special speech bubbles if necessary (e.g., spiky bubbles for shouting) }}"
  visual_effects: "{{ Specify manga visual effects. Manga symbols (sweat, veins, sparkle), effect lines (concentration lines, speed lines, tremor lines), visualization of sound effects, etc. }}"

Characters:
  # Character definition. Alphanumeric IDs recommended.
  {{ Character ID_1 }}:
    description: "{{ Appearance, hairstyle, color, clothing, distinctive items, personality and expression tendencies. If reference images exist, write the file name here (e.g., reference image_0.png). }}"
  {{ Character ID_2 }}:
    description: "{{ Second character details... Describe for the number of characters. }}"
  # Add as needed...

Storyboard:
  # 4-tier panel division definition
  Tier_1:
    {{ Panel ID_T1_P1 (e.g., Panel_1_Large_Top) }}:
      scene: "{{ Specific situation description for this panel. Who, where, and what they are doing. Composition and camera work can also be specified. }}"
      dialogue:
        - speaker: "{{ Speaker's Character ID }}"
          type: "{{ Type of line: speech(normal), thought(thought), whisper(whisper), shout(shout), monologue(monologue/narration) }}"
          text: "{{ Specific content of the line. Use \n if a line break is needed. }}"
        # Add list if there are multiple lines in the same panel
        # - speaker: "..."
        #   type: "..."
        #   text: "..."
    # Write here to add panels to Tier_1
  Tier_2:
    {{ Panel ID_T2_P1 }}:
      scene: "{{ Scene details }}"
      dialogue:
        - speaker: "{{ Speaker ID }}"
          type: "{{ Type }}"
          text: "{{ Content }}"
    # Add panels as needed
  Tier_3:
    {{ Panel ID_T3_P1 }}:
      scene: "{{ Scene details }}"
      dialogue:
        - speaker: "{{ Speaker ID }}"
          type: "{{ Type }}"
          text: "{{ Content }}"
    # Add panels as needed
  Tier_4:
    {{ Panel ID_T4_P1 }}:
      scene: "{{ Scene details }}"
      dialogue:
        - speaker: "{{ Speaker ID }}"
          type: "{{ Type }}"
          text: "{{ Content }}"
    # Add panels as needed

content:
A hyper-realistic, surreal composite shot utilizing forced perspective to create a dramatic scale difference, featuring an extreme close-up profile view on the right side of a man with uploaded face as reference, his expression one of slack-jawed astonishment with mouth slightly agape as he gazes downward. His large hand extends into the focal plane on the left, palm upturned and open, cradling a tiny, miniature version of a man standing directly on the skin of the palm; the miniature figure is dressed in a black t-shirt and loose beige khaki trousers, captured in a dynamic, slightly crouched stance as if balancing or reacting to the giant. The cinematography employs a shallow depth of field with an 85mm portrait lens, keeping the giant's profile and the miniature figure in sharp focus while rendering the background—a warm-toned domestic interior with reddish-brown wooden cabinetry and vague blue shapes—into a creamy, soft bokeh. The lighting is warm and naturalistic, suggestive of indoor tungsten sources, highlighting the skin texture, facial hair, and subsurface scattering on the giant's face, rendered in 8k resolution with the fidelity of an Octane Render, emphasizing the absurdity and realism of the "shrunk" subject matter.

Man should be fully visible

content:
You are a "professional manga writer" and "AI Art Director". Based on the [Character Image] and [Theme] I provide, please create a **10-page manga generation prompt sequence that can be used directly with NanoBananaPro (high-performance image generation AI)**.

## Production Requirements (NanoBananaPro Hybrid Optimized)
1. **Output Format**:
   - Output each page in a `Code Block` format that is easy to copy and paste.
   - **Language Specification (Hybrid Strategy)**:
     - **Visual Description (Visuals)**: Character, background, and art style specifications should be in **"English"** to maintain consistency.
     - **Text Rendering**: Dialogue and sound effects within speech bubbles should be specified in **"Japanese"**.
     - **Aspect Ratio**: Each page should be structured assuming a `Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio`.

2. **Utilization of NanoBananaPro Specific Features**:
   - **Text Rendering**:
     - This model can accurately render Japanese text within the image.
     - Describe the Japanese dialogue by writing `Text: "[Japanese Dialogue]"` in the Prompt.
     - **Contextual Understanding**:
     - Describe the situation using English close to natural language, not just a list of words.

3. **Story Structure and Direction**:
   - **Title Determination**: Devise a "high-sense title" that reflects the theme, conveys the content at a glance, and captures interest.
     - **Title Logo Placement**:
     - Create a "Title Panel" where the title logo is prominently placed on **Page 1 or Page 2**.
     - **Rendering Instruction**: Include instructions to render the title text itself as "decorative typography" within the image.
     - **"Setup and Punchline" Structure**:
     - **Page 1 (The Hook)**: Include a "strong setup (mystery, shock, empathy)" that strongly captures the reader's interest.
     - **Page 10 (The Punchline)**: The conclusion, or a cliffhanger leading to the next part.

4. **Page Description Rules (Strictly Enforced)**:
   The prompt must always include the following sections.
   
   - **Header**: `【IMAGE_GEN_ONLY】: Generate a high-resolution professional Japanese manga page. Full Color. Vertical 9:16. 4K.`
   
   - **【STRICT CHARACTER CONSISTENCY (English)】**:
     - **Important**: The **"Character Appearance Description (English)"** created by analyzing the initial image must be written in the prompt for **all pages**, without changing a single word.
     - **Prohibition**: "Omission" or "As above" is **strictly forbidden**. The entire definition must be written out every time.
     - Example: `Black bob cut hair, red ribbon, golden eyes, wearing a futuristic cyberpunk school uniform.`
   
   - **【STRICT STYLE CONSISTENCY (English)】**:
     - **Style Analysis and Fixation**: Analyze the input image and define its characteristics (Lines, Color, Lighting) as a detailed English prompt.
     - **Prohibition**: This is also **forbidden** to "omit". Output the full text every time.
     - Example: `Thick confident outlines, cel shading with soft gradients, vibrant high-saturation colors, dramatic lighting, anime screentones.`

   - **【PANEL LAYOUT & VISUALS (English + Japanese Text)】**:
     - **Panel Composition**: **Always place 4 to 8 panels** per page. (3 panels or less is forbidden)
     - **Content Description**:
       - `Panel 1 (Top-Right):`
       - `Visual: [English description of action/angle]`
       - `Text: "[Japanese Dialogue in bubble]"`

   - **【PAGE NUMBERING】**:
     - Instruction to render the page number (e.g., "1") small in the bottom-right corner.

## Output Template Example

### Page X

```text
【IMAGE_GEN_ONLY】: Generate a high-resolution professional Japanese manga page. Full Color. Vertical 9:16. --ar 9:16

# STRICT CHARACTER CONSISTENCY (DO NOT CHANGE)
[Paste the EXACT English Master Description here... NO ABBREVIATIONS]

# STRICT STYLE CONSISTENCY (DO NOT CHANGE)
[Paste the EXACT English Master Style Description here... NO ABBREVIATIONS]

# PAGE NUMBER
Small clear text "X" in the bottom-right corner.

# PANEL LAYOUT & VISUALS (Target: 5-8 Panels, Top-Right to Bottom-Left)

## Panel 1 (Top-Right):
- Visual: [English description of the scene and action]
- Text: "[Japanese Dialogue]"

content:
A 2×2 grid cinematic composition (four equal panels within one frame), aspect ratio 4:5, extremely realistic, photorealistic, film-quality imagery. Each panel depicts a different moment between the same two characters, unified by identical lighting, wardrobe, environment, and color grading.

Overall aesthetic: inspired by the gold-ornamented, ceremonial atmosphere of the reference image—real materials, real light, real skin, no painterly effects.

🔲 PANEL DESCRIPTIONS (READ AS ONE IMAGE)

Panel 1 (Top Left)
He is hugging her from behind, close and possessive.
Mia Goth stands still, her posture tense, shoulders slightly raised. Her pale, luminous skin contrasts with the heavy gold-embroidered ceremonial garment draped over her head and shoulders. Bill Skarsgård as Nosferatu presses close behind her, his face near her temple, eyes half-lidded, expression restrained but predatory. His hands rest gently yet firmly at her waist. The gold background glows softly.

Panel 2 (Top Right)
He is beside her, leaning in to bite her neck.
His mouth hovers just at her throat, lips barely touching skin. The woman’s head tilts slightly away, eyelids heavy, her expression weakening as she begins to lose consciousness—soft slackening of the mouth, unfocused gaze. Subtle tension in her neck and jaw. His face is partly in shadow, sharp cheekbones and hollow eyes emphasized.

Panel 3 (Bottom Left)
They stand side by side.
The man turns his head slightly toward her, studying her with cold intent. She faces forward and looks directly into the camera, eyes glassy, vulnerable, haunted. Her expression is calm but resigned. The gold embroidery and symbolic patterns are sharply detailed, realistic fabric weight and stitching visible.

Panel 4 (Bottom Right)
This panel is an exact recreation of the reference photo.
Same pose, same spacing, same lighting, same expressions, same wardrobe, same background texture—faithful, photorealistic reproduction with no reinterpretation.

👤 CHARACTER DETAILS (CONSISTENT ACROSS ALL PANELS)

Mia Goth
Ethereal woman with pale luminous skin, delicate symmetrical features, expressive melancholic eyes, softly parted lips. Subtle emotional tension throughout—vulnerability mixed with quiet resolve. Draped in an elaborate gold-embroidered ceremonial garment with Art Nouveau geometry and mosaic symbolism, rendered as real textile embroidery with metallic thread, natural folds and weight.

Bill Skarsgård as Nosferatu
Tall, imposing, gaunt aristocratic frame. Elongated facial structure, sharp cheekbones, hollow eyes. Stillness that feels controlled and predatory. Dressed in dark antique clothing that absorbs light, contrasting strongly against the radiant gold environment.

🌟 ENVIRONMENT & LIGHTING

Richly textured, softly glowing gold interior

Aged gilded walls, embossed ceremonial patterns

Real material depth, patina, imperfections

Dramatic cinematic lighting

Soft diffused key light on her face

Warm gold bou

content:
You are a "Professional Manga Writer" and "AI Art Director."
Based on the [Character Image] and [Theme] I provide, please create **10 pages of manga generation prompts that can be used directly with NanoBananaPro (high-performance image generation AI)**.

## Production Requirements (NanoBananaPro Optimized)
1. **Output Format**:
   - Output each page in a `Code Block` format that is easy to copy and paste.
   - **Language Specification**: All prompt descriptions must be in **"Japanese (Japanese)"**. Utilize NanoBananaPro's Japanese understanding to provide natural and detailed instructions, not translation-like phrasing.
   - **Aspect Ratio**: Each page must be composed assuming a `Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio`.

2. **Utilization of NanoBananaPro Specific Features**:
   - **Text Rendering**:
     - This model can accurately draw text within the image.
     - Instructions for each panel must clearly include **instructions to render "dialogue within speech bubbles" and "hand-drawn text (onomatopoeia) in the background" as part of the image**.
   - **Contextual Understanding**:
     - Prioritize descriptions in **sentence form (natural language)**—"who is doing what, where, and with what emotion"—rather than a list of tokens.

3. **Story Composition and Direction**:
   - **Title Determination**: Devise a "high-sense title" that reflects the theme, conveys the content at a glance, and captures interest.
   - **Title Logo Placement**:
     - Create a "title panel" on **Page 1 or Page 2** where the title logo is prominently placed.
     - **Drawing Instruction**: Include instructions to render the title text itself as "decorative typography" within the image.
   - **"Setup and Payoff" Structure**:
     - **Page 1 (The Hook)**: Include a "strong hook (mystery, shock, empathy)" that strongly captures the reader's interest.
     - **Page 10 (The Punchline)**: The punchline or a cliffhanger leading to the next part.

4. **Rules for Describing Each Page (Strictly Enforced)**:
   The prompt must always include the following sections.
   
   - **Header**: `High-resolution professional Japanese manga page. Full color. Vertical (9:16).`
   
   - **[Character Definition (Fixed)]**:
     - **Important**: Create a Japanese definition sentence of the **"Character's Appearance Description (clothes, hairstyle, color, accessories)"** analyzed from the initial image, and write it in the **prompt for every page** without changing a single word.
     - Example Description: "A girl with black bob-cut hair, a red ribbon, golden eyes, wearing a futuristic cyberpunk uniform."
   
   - **[Art Style Definition (Fixed)]**:
     - **Art Style Analysis and Fixation**: Analyze the input image and define its art style (line thickness, coloring touch, lighting) as a detailed Japanese prompt.
     - This must also be written in the **prompt for every page**.
     - Example Description: "Clear, confident main lines, anime coloring with soft gradients, high saturation and vivid colors, dramatic lighting."

   - **[Panel Layout & Visuals]**:
     - **Panel Composition**: **Must place 4 to 8 panels** per page. (Fewer than 3 panels is forbidden)
     - **Eye Guidance**: Specify the placement of each panel (e.g., "top right panel," "bottom left panel") following the Japanese manga format (top right → top left → bottom right → bottom left).
     - **Content must include the following elements**:
       1. **Situation Description**: Character acting, angle, background.
       2. **Text Rendering Specification**: Dialogue to be placed in speech bubbles, or sound effects.

   - **[Page Number]**:
     - Instruction to draw a small page number (e.g., "1") in the bottom right corner.

## Output Template Example

### Page X

```text
High-resolution professional Japanese manga page. Full color. Vertical (9:16).

# [Character Definition (Fixed - Do Not Change)]
[Paste the detailed Japanese description of the analyzed character here...]

# [Art Style Definition (Fixed - Do Not Change)]
[Paste the detailed Japanese description of the analyzed art style here...]

# [Page Number]
Draw the number "X" in a small, clear font in the bottom right corner of the image.

# [Panel Layout & Content (5-8 panels, from top right to bottom left)]

## Panel 1 (Top Right):
- **Situation**: [Composition such as close-up or long shot, and character acting]
- **Text Rendering**: Draw "[Dialogue]" inside a speech bubble.

## Panel 2 (Top Left):
- **Situation**: ...
- **Text Rendering**: Large hand-drawn text "[Onomatopoeia]" in the background. "[Dialogue]" in a speech bubble.

## Panel 3 (Middle Right):
- **Situation**: ...
- **Text Rendering**: ...

(Continue for the number of panels)

## Panel 6 (Bottom Left):
- **Situation**: ...
- **Text Rendering**: ...

Upon receiving an image (or instructions for an image) from the user, first reply with **"I have confirmed the character image."**
Next, determine if the image is [Live-Action] or [Illustration] and present a **"Draft Art Style Definition Prompt"** based on that determination.
2. Story idea proposals (5 total)

content:
**CORE INSTRUCTION FOR THE MODEL:**
Analyze the personality traits and potential conflicts of the CHARACTERS previously provided as input. You must infer how these specific individuals would interact and place them into the four scenarios below based on their likelihood to be involved in that specific type of scene (e.g., put gossips in the confessional, aggressors in the fight scene).

**MANDATORY VISUAL AESTHETIC ("Real Broadcast Look"):**
The images must NOT look like staged photography. They must look like raw, unpolished TV broadcast footage.
* **Crucial Details:** Every panel must include on-screen graphics: timestamps (e.g., "DAY 12 | 14:32"), camera location identifiers (e.g., "CAM 1 - LIVING AREA"), and a small, semi-transparent channel logo in a corner.
* **Textures:** Expect video grain, slight lens distortion, harsh fluorescent lighting, and occasional digital compression artifacts.

**GRID BREAKDOWN (2x2 Layout):**

**[TOP ROW]**
* **[PANEL 1: Top-Left] Domestic Friction (Kitchen/Living Area).** Wide-angle fixed CCTV camera shot. Harsh, unflattering overhead lighting. Based on inputs, show a tense moment of daily life—two characters with incompatible habits arguing over cleaning or food, while others sit uncomfortably in the background. The composition is messy and naturalistic.
* **[PANEL 2: Top-Right] The Confessional Booth (El Confesionario).** Tight, claustrophobic fish-eye lens close-up. The background is a simple, soundproofed wall. Select the character most likely to vent or gossip from the inputs. They are looking directly into the lens, highly emotional (crying or angrily gesturing), breaking the fourth wall.

**[BOTTOM ROW]**
* **[PANEL 3: Bottom-Left] Night Vision Secrets (Bedroom).** Monochrome green or grey infrared night-vision shot. Grainy, low fidelity. Total darkness in the room. Show two characters (strategic allies based on inputs) whispering conspiratorially in a bed, barely visible under covers.
* **[PANEL 4: Bottom-Right] The Explosion (Garden/Smoking Area).** Chaotic, slightly shaky "handheld camera" feel, as if an operator ran to catch the action. High drama. A screaming argument at a party or nighttime gathering. The most volatile characters from the inputs are being physically separated by others. Flashing lights or dramatic shadows.

**STYLE:** Raw reality TV broadcast screenshots, 2x2 grid, highly detailed, 4k
title: Raw Reality TV Broadcast Screenshots (2x2 Grid)
description: A complex, structured prompt designed to generate a 2x2 grid of images mimicking raw, unpolished TV broadcast footage, specifically in the style of a reality show like Big Brother. It mandates on-screen graphics (timestamps, camera IDs) and specific visual aesthetics for four different scenes: Domestic Friction, Confessional Booth, Night Vision Secrets, and The Explosion.

content:
An astonishing hyper-realistic 8K photograph capturing the moment {argument name="character name" default="Zenitsu Agatsuma"} from "{argument name="manga name" default="Demon Slayer"}" steps out of a giant physical manga book.

Zenitsu in the real world:
Zenitsu's image is photorealistic, with messy gold and orange hair, wearing a realistically textured Demon Slayer Corps uniform and his iconic yellow haori with white triangle patterns. His expression is determined, his eyes sharp, full of resolve, tightly gripping his Nichirin blade in its sheath. Half of his body has stepped onto the wooden bedroom floor, while the other half remains within the manga pages.
The giant manga book and interaction:
A giant, thick Japanese edition of "Demon Slayer" manga book is spread open on a slightly worn wooden floor. Zenitsu breaks the boundary of the paper, and the pages are violently torn, curled, and burst where he steps out, with paper scraps and toner flying in the air.

Details within the manga page (picture-in-picture):
The pages display an extremely authentic black-and-white Japanese manga style.
Style: Rough black ink lines, rich screentone textures for shading, exaggerated speed lines.

Layout: Strict Japanese right-to-left reading order, a surreal four-panel manga (yonkoma) spread.
Content: Inside the broken panel, a trapped, manga-style Zenitsu can be seen. He is wearing the same clothes, shedding noodle tears in the panel, frantically knocking on the borders of the manga panel, accompanied by large Japanese onomatopoeia like "出られない!" (Can't get out!), "えええ!?", and "ドンドンドン" (Knocking sound). The manga version of him is watching the real-world version of himself tear the frame in terror.

Environment and lighting:
The bedroom background is soft-focused, with domestic items like bed legs and bookshelves. Natural afternoon light streams in from the side window, illuminating the edges of the torn paper and the fabric texture of Zenitsu's clothes, emphasizing the strong contrast between reality and the two-dimensional world.

content:
Please generate a manga page.

#Character (Highest Priority):
**[Important: Perfect reproduction of the attached image (image_urls)] This is not a reference image but an “unalterable master data.” Strictly adhere to the following processes in all generated panels.**

1. **Fixing Features:** Maintain 100% of the attached image's **“hair style, hair color, eye shape, clothing, and accessories.”** Unauthorized arrangements or simplifications are prohibited.
2. **Deformation Rules:** When applying the #Style (chibi character), **only the “head-to-body ratio” should be reduced, and the “face part arrangement and hairstyle design” must not deviate from the attached image.**
3. **Maintaining Identity:** Even if the angle changes, it must be “the same character viewed from a different angle.” Do not change the face to look like a different person.
4. **Do not cause “Prompt Bleed (instruction leakage).”**

#Output Size
9:16
#Style:
**Basic Art Style:** Monochrome, Japanese manga, gag manga style, thick outline lines.
**Style prompt:** Japanese manga, chibi style, thick outline lines, monochrome.
**Format:** Vertical writing, Japanese panel layout read from right to left.

#Text Generation Rules (Strict Adherence):
**[Important: Natural Japanese and Elimination of Duplication]**
When generating dialogue in the manga, perform proofreading immediately before output to absolutely prevent the following errors:

1. **Prohibition of Tautology:** Do not repeat the same word or conjunction twice, such as “that is, that is,” “but, but,” or “really, really.” Stuttering expressions are prohibited.
2. **Natural Colloquial Language:** Use natural speech appropriate for the character's personality, not textbook sentences.
3. **Garbled Text Check:** Confirm that Kanji and Hiragana are not corrupted.

#Direction/Camera Work:
**[Important: Direction while maintaining features]**
Use the following camera work within the range that does not distort the character's face or hairstyle to avoid monotony:

- **Close-up:** Emphasizing emotion (※Do not overly deform facial parts)
- **Long Shot:** Explaining the situation
- **High/Low Angle:** Expressing impact or cuteness
- **Diagonal Composition:** Expressing agitation or action

#Scenario Progression:
If no specific panel designation is given, summarize and compose in 3 to 5 panels.
Panel arrangement should not be uniform but irregular or free-form, while maintaining the line of sight guidance from “top right to bottom left.”

#Negative Prompt (Elements to Avoid):
**repeating words, stuttering text, duplicate phrases, tautology,** altering character design, changing hair color, changing hairstyle, different outfit, monotonous composition, repetitive angles, character facing forward in all panels, flat lighting, messy panel borders, text overlap.

#Scenario: {argument name="scenario" default="Think of the continuation of the attached manga."}

description: A detailed system prompt for Nano Banana Pro aimed at generating manga pages while strictly maintaining character consistency based on an uploaded reference image. It includes specific rules for fixing character features (hair, eyes, clothing) as 'master data,' applying a chibi style only to body proportions, and enforcing strict rules for natural Japanese dialogue and camera work to avoid monotony.

content:
Ultra-realistic cinematic scene inspired by Stranger Things. Steve Harrington (from Image 1) is suspended in mid-air inside the Upside Down, his face clearly visible and emotionally broken—eyes glassy with tears, lips trembling, fear mixed with acceptance. His body is slightly contorted by an unseen psychic force, veins subtly visible, a faint trail of blood from his nose.
Vecna (from Image 2) appears behind him, partially emerging from darkness and red mist, not attacking violently but silently controlling the moment, one hand raised with cracked, organic skin and glowing red energy. Vecna’s presence feels inevitable and overwhelming rather than loud.
The environment is alive: black vines crawl along ruined structures, spores floating slowly through the air like falling ash. Steve’s bat lies broken on the ground below, symbolizing loss and sacrifice.
Lighting is highly emotional—cold blue light on Steve’s face to highlight vulnerability, contrasted with deep crimson and shadow around Vecna. Shallow depth of field, cinematic focus on Steve’s expression, volumetric fog, dramatic backlighting, hyper-real skin detail, emotional micro-expressions, Netflix dark horror drama style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 35mm film look
